rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.24+commit.e11b9ed9"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"inputs":[],"name":"IS_SCRIPT","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"run","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"stateVariables":{"POOL_USDC_AMOUNT":{"details":"50,000 mUSDC (6 decimals) \u2014 initial pool liquidity top-up"},"SCORE_A":{"details":"Credit score for Wallet A \u2014 750 puts it firmly in the Silver tier      (600 <= score < 800) and close to Gold, useful for UI demos."},"SCORE_B":{"details":"Credit score for Wallet B \u2014 320 is the minimum viable Bronze score."},"WALLET_USDC_AMOUNT":{"details":"100,000 mUSDC (6 decimals)"}},"title":"Seed","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Foundry script that seeds the CreditLayer testnet deployment with         test wallets, USDC balances and on-chain credit scores.         Required environment variables         \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500         MOCK_USDC          \u2014 deployed MockUSDC address         CREDIT_SCORE_NFT   \u2014 deployed CreditScoreNFT address         CREDIT_ORACLE      \u2014 deployed CreditOracle address         LENDING_POOL       \u2014 deployed CreditLendingPool address         TEST_WALLET_A      \u2014 first test wallet (will receive score 750 \u2013 Silver/Gold border)         TEST_WALLET_B      \u2014 second test wallet (will receive score 320 \u2013 Bronze)         NOTE on score submission         \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500         CreditOracle.submitScore() requires a valid EIP-712 signature from         the trusted signer.  On a live testnet you must generate the         signatures off-chain (see the companion `scripts/sign-attestation.ts`         helper) and paste them in, OR deploy a version of CreditOracle that         exposes the seedScore() admin bypass below.         For local Anvil / fork testing the script calls seedScore() directly         on the NFT via an admin path (the script deployer is set as oracle         temporarily).  The exact approach is toggled by the USE_ADMIN_SEED         env var:           USE_ADMIN_SEED=true  \u2192 bypass signature, call NFT directly (local only)           USE_ADMIN_SEED=false \u2192 call submitScore() with pre-built sigs (testnet)         Run example (local Anvil)         \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500         USE_ADMIN_SEED=true \\         forge script script/Seed.s.sol \\           --rpc-url http://localhost:8545 \\           --broadcast \\           -vvvv         Run example (Base Sepolia \u2014 requires valid sigs)         \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500         forge script script/Seed.s.sol \\           --rpc-url base_sepolia \\           --broadcast \\
